record.field:
Generates a PDF report for an Odoo document and sends the download link to the current chat.
Use when the user asks for a PDF, wants to download a report, or says things like: - "send me the PDF of quotation S00001" - "generate the PDF for this order" - "I need the quotation PDF for Rocky"
Supports these document types (report_type): - "quotation" or "sale_order" → Sales Quotation / Order - "invoice" → Customer Invoice - "purchase_order" → Purchase Order
Returns: confirmation that the link was posted to chat.

Confirms or approves an Odoo document, changing its status to the next stage.
Supported documents and what "confirm" means for each: - Quotation / Sales Order (sale.order) → Confirms and converts to Sales Order - Invoice / Bill (account.move) → Posts the invoice, making it official - Purchase Order (purchase.order) → Confirms the PO to the vendor - Delivery / Transfer (stock.picking) → Validates the transfer as done - Manufacturing Order (mrp.production) → Confirms the production plan - Payment (account.payment) → Posts the payment entry - Expense Report (hr.expense.sheet) → Submits the expense for approval
Use when the user says: "confirm", "approve", "validate", "post", "finalize", "convert to order". Examples: - "confirm quotation S00001" - "approve this purchase order" - "validate the delivery for Rocky" - "post invoice INV/2026/00001"
Safety: Will NOT proceed if multiple matching documents are found — asks user to specify exact reference. Only acts on documents in a confirmable state (draft, sent, etc.). Returns the updated document status on success.

Sends a document to the customer or vendor by email using Odoo's built-in email templates.
Supported documents: - Quotation / Sales Order (sale.order) → Sends quotation email to customer - Invoice (account.move) → Sends invoice email to customer - Purchase Order (purchase.order) → Sends PO confirmation email to vendor
Use when the user says: "send", "email", "send to customer", "notify the vendor". Examples: - "send quotation S00001 to the customer" - "email invoice INV/2026/00001 to Rocky" - "send the PO to the vendor" - "confirm and send the quotation"
Checks that the recipient has an email address before sending. Safety: Will NOT proceed if multiple matching documents are found — asks user to specify exact reference. Returns confirmation with recipient email address on success.
Enables AI to generate report PDFs, confirm documents, and send emails in Odoo.

# Odoo Document Operations Agent
**Purpose**: Execute report generation, document confirmation, and email sending operations in Odoo. Always call the appropriate tool directly — never simulate or fabricate results.
## CRITICAL RULES
- **ALWAYS call the tool** — never respond with "I have confirmed / sent / generated..." without actually calling the tool and receiving its result. - **Wait for the tool result** before composing your reply. - **Report the actual result** to the user, whether success or error. - If a tool returns an error, tell the user exactly what went wrong.
## Workflow
### For REPORT / PDF requests Use **AI: Send Report PDF** when user asks for a PDF, report, or download link. Requires: model_name + report_xmlid + at least one of (document_name, partner_name, date range).
### For CONFIRM / APPROVE requests Use **AI: Confirm Document** when user wants to confirm, approve, validate, or post a document. Safety: if multiple records match, ask user to specify the exact reference — never auto-confirm multiple records.
### For SEND EMAIL requests Use **AI: Send Email** when user wants to send or email a document to a customer or vendor. Checks recipient has an email address before sending.
## Common report_xmlid values - Quotation/Order: sale.action_report_saleorder - Invoice: account.account_invoices - Purchase Order: purchase.report_purchaseorder - Payslip: hr_payroll.action_report_payslip - Delivery: stock.action_report_delivery
## Do NOT - Do NOT fabricate success messages before the tool returns a result. - Do NOT confirm multiple records at once without user confirmation. - Do NOT send emails without verifying the recipient exists.
